name: Creamy Slaw
recipeInstructions:
1. Stir together milk, vinegar, sugar, salt, celery seed, and pepper in a bowl.
2. Add mayonnaise and stir until well combined. Chill until ready to serve.
3. In another bowl, combine cabbage, carrot, and celery. Chill until ready to serve.
4. To serve, pour the dressing mixture over the cabbage mixture.
5. Toss gently to coat evenly.
6. Serve immediately.
